name: The Tunnels of Saint Mercy Road
short_description: The Tunnels of Saint Mercy Road is an immersive horror experience that spans 8 unique areas, each providing a sense of unease and a new mystery to unravel.
detailed_description:
Inspired by the classics of horror gaming, The Tunnels of Saint Mercy Road is a blend of psychological horror, atmospheric horror and creature horror that is certain to give you chills.

The tunnels under Saint Mercy road are known for many things. Paranormal encounters... Mysterious cults... Monsters galore... The legends around town spread like a game of telephone. They can't all be true... can they?

What if I told you that the truth can be revealed, but it would be a journey you have to take... ALONE

The Tunnels of Saint Mercy Road is an immersive horror experience that spans 8 unique areas, each providing a sense of unease and a new mystery to unravel. Armed with only a lantern, you will descend into the tunnels under Saint Mercy road and explore it's depths and find clues to uncover the truth behind the local legends.

Do you have the courage to descend into darkness?

I. Dare. You.

FEATURES:

  • An immersive, single player atmospheric experience (headphones suggested).

  • 8 unique areas that will give you a different sense of dread the further you delve.

  • Solve puzzles and complete objectives to descend further into the dark tunnels.

  • Stylized graphics - Re-experience classic horror with a modern first person take.

  • Short Story - Can be completed in under two hours.

  • Inspired by classic horror games and literature.

  • Gamepad Support - Play with your gamepad, keyboard and mouse or accessibility device.
